adventures.title: El Calvario
adventures.desc: Explore the beauty of Viñales with the “El Calvario” excursion, a journey full of stunning landscapes, from intermountain valleys to coffee and tobacco crops. Visit the Prehistory Mural and finish with a refreshing swim in the El Calvario river. Ideal for cycling and nature lovers, this experience combines adventure, exercise, and cultural immersion.

imgs.alt: Paved road winding between majestic green mogotes under a blue sky with white clouds.

adventures.title: El Resbaloso
adventures.desc: Embark on a unique experience that combines sports, culture, and history in Viñales. Explore the Palenque de los Cimarrones to learn about the rich Afro-Cuban culture, navigate the underground river of the Indian Cave (Cueva del Indio), and enjoy a refreshing swim in the Resbaloso River, surrounded by nature. Culminate your adventure with a visit to the first Agricultural Production Cooperative founded by Fidel Castro, where you will learn about Cuba's agricultural history. An ideal excursion for those looking for a mix of physical activity and cultural enrichment.

imgs.alt: Natural pool of crystal clear water fed by a small waterfall in the Resbaloso River.

adventures.title: Touring valleys
adventures.desc: Enjoy a three-hour excursion through the Penitence Valley (Valle de la Penitencia), exploring mogotes, intermountain valleys, and the Prehistory Mural. Make a stop at a natural viewpoint and finish the tour in the Viñales Valley, visiting tobacco drying houses and a coffee plantation. An ideal experience for cycling and nature lovers.

imgs.alt: Enormous modern rock painting on the side of a mogote in the Valley of Penitence.

adventures.title: Ecological agriculture
adventures.desc: Explore the fascinating ecosystem of the Pizarras del Sur in a three-hour tour that will take you to a lake for a refreshing dip and then to the El Paraíso Agroecological Farm, where you will learn about ecological agriculture in Cuba. Ideal for those seeking nature, adventure, and learning, this excursion offers a complete and unique experience in the heart of the Pizarras del Sur.

imgs.alt: Rows of sustainable crops in an agroecological farm with the mountains of the Viñales Valley in the background.

adventures.title: Visit to the lake
adventures.desc: Discover the charm of the Pizarras del Sur, a fascinating and little-known landscape. The tour will take you through these formations to a lake, where you can enjoy a refreshing dip, and then you will descend to the Viñales Valley, a place full of greenery, culture, and peasant traditions. This excursion offers a unique experience, combining nature and culture for an unforgettable day in Viñales.

imgs.alt: Mountain reflected on the calm surface of a lake at sunset in the Pizarras del Sur.
